section_title: Offence committed on journey or voyage
chapter_title: Jurisdiction Of The Criminal Courts In Inquiries And Trials
text: When an offence is committed, whilst the person by or against whom, or the thing in respect of which, the offence is committed is in the course of performing a journey or voyage, the offence may be inquired into or tried by a Court through or into whose local jurisdiction that person or thing passed in the course of that journey or voyage.
